title: Overview Command Center Compact Polish and Bottom KPI Removal

bottom_kpi_removal.removed_component_mount: MetricsBar is no longer mounted as a permanent bottom strip in AppShell.
bottom_kpi_removal.headline_indicators_location: Right Intelligence panel in Countywide/default intelligence mode.
bottom_kpi_removal.map_layout_effect: Overview grid can use the vertical space formerly occupied by the permanent KPI strip; no fixed KPI footer remains.

command_center_height_reduction.command_center_copy: Search, explore, model, or save a report-ready snapshot.
command_center_height_reduction.result: Command cards are visibly shorter and the command area reads as a slim control header rather than a large dashboard block.

snapshot_count_placement.effect: Snapshot count no longer squeezes the command card grid.

map_layout_improvement.known_note: Browser DOM smoke verified the KPI strip removal and compact command area. SceneView canvas height was not used as a hard metric because ArcGIS rendering is asynchronous.

workflow_preservation.Search Parcel: passed; search card focuses the top search input.
workflow_preservation.Explore Countywide: passed; countywide panel and map layer controls appear.
workflow_preservation.Model Lab: passed; Model Lab Intelligence and Development Research Signal copy appear.
workflow_preservation.Planning Snapshot: passed; Planning Snapshot and Executive Summary surfaces load.

npm_run_build_webpack.note: An initial build command timed out while the Next build process continued in the background. After that process exited, a clean rerun completed successfully.

snapshot_mode.toast_note: The saved toast can be transient; Snapshot Capture state was verified.

browser_console: Existing opaque ArcGIS-style error message: r

remaining_known_issues: The existing ArcGIS-related opaque console error 'r' remains present and was not introduced by this UI polish.
The Snapshot saved toast may disappear before smoke checks catch it; the persistent Snapshot Capture state was used for verification.
